rationale: Brand name (77 unique). Used for grouping, encoded for models in §5.
Retail channel (DVH/DISCOUNT/CONV). New dimension from expanded scope.
Month (first-of-month). Basis for lags and calendar features.
What we forecast. Will also be log-transformed (log1p) for stability in §6.
= unit_price_t × sales_units_t. Trivially recovers target if price known.
Subset of sales_value measured only on promoted units. Inherits leak.
Subset of target sold on promo. Direct leak.
= sales_units_promo_t / sales_units_t. Ratio of two leaky measures; tells relative promo composition at t. Kept for reference only; causal (lagged) version will be engineered in §3.

% of stores distributing the brand (ACV-weighted). Retailer decision, typically known 1+ months in advance. Slow-moving (rarely changes >5pp/month). Standard in retail forecasting (e.g. Nielsen Marketing Mix models).
